name: C.A.R.D.S. RPG: The Misty Battlefield
short_description: This game combines roguelike-style deckbuilding with SRPGs to create an all-new experience! Follow Vel as she leads the Clausewitz Battalion into battle against Fahftania and the Hellmuth Brigade. Collect 100 different cards to build the strongest deck and fight enemies on a map shrouded in mist.
detailed_description:
Feature List

  • Save data from the demo version cannot be transferred to the full version. Please take note. 

  • The demo and full versions differ in terms of implemented features.  

    • Deck Building Style  

      • Demo Version: Play with a shared deck for all units.  

      • Full Version: Choose from two options - ① Shared deck for all units or ② Individual decks per unit.  

    • Suspend Save and Load  

      • Demo Version: ✖ (Auto-save only)  

      • Full Version: 〇 (Auto-save and 30 manual save slots)  

    • Stage Retry  

      • Demo Version: ✖  

      • Full Version: 〇  

    • Stage Selection Screen  

      • Demo Version: ✖ (Only stages 1–4 available)  

      • Full Version: 〇 (Freely access and revisit stages)  

    • Steam Deck

      • Demo Version: Not Supported

      • Full Version: Playable

  • Additionally, other fine-tuning adjustments, specification changes, and bug fixes are only available in the full version.


About the Game

Roguelike-style deckbuilding and SRPGs meet in this game to create an all-new genre!

Lead the Clausewitz Battalion into a map shrouded in mist. Find and enhance cards to create powerful decks to do battle with against strong foes.

On that day, a jet black dragon descended on the kingdom, and in the blink of an eye it had destroyed everything.

The 100 Years' War...

That was the name given to the ongoing battle between the 17 countries.

Already it seemed like a war with no end, but the appearance of a single dragon changed everything.

It was a "chimera" created from a dragon with no interest in the humans' war and the spirit of a warmongering human.

The weapon, created by the enemy country Fahftania, could not be completed without great sacrifice.

However, Fahftania joined forces with the giant organization Hellmuth Brigade to sacrifice 1000 of their citizens to create the greatest chimera in history.

Having acquired this overwhelming power, no one possessed the ability to defeat Fahftania and the Hellmuth Brigade.

Seth Arden, a scout from the Clausewitz Battalion has discovered that Fahftania is creating chimeras in their aim to take over the world.

Hearing this, Captain Vel Dina is angered by their inhumane experiments.

To put a stop to these terrible, cold-hearted experiments, the Clausewitz Battalion sets off for Fahftania.

However, they would soon find that all of Fahftania is under the Hellmuth Brigade thrall...

・ Fresh Gameplay: combining roguelike-style deckbuilding with SRPGs for a brand-new experience

・ Cards: over 100 varieties, all with unique designs

・ Search Through the Mist: Clear away the mist on the map to discover enemies, facilities, and equipment and form a battle plan

・ Battle system: combines SRPG turn-based battles with card battles

Witness the unique tactical gameplay offered by SRPGs with a rougelike twist!

Use over 100 varieties of cards to build powerful decks, and strategically confront enemies on an SRPG field.

Every encounter requires a different strategy. Adapt to new battlegrounds and plan accordingly.

Build the strongest deck and put a stop to the Hellmuth Brigade's actions.

Don't miss out on this new gaming experience!

It adds the elements of card battles to the traditional SRPG strategy-focused turn-based battles.

Good deckbuilding is important to gain the upper edge in any battle.

A fusion of the strategic positioning and tactics of SRPGs, with the excitement of card battlers!

A map shrouded in mist awaits you.

Clear the mist away as you advance forward, and discover hidden enemies, facilities, and equipment.

What could be hiding in the mist? Anticipate anything and account for everything in your strategy.

Different cards will appear on different stages, allowing you to build a new deck and experience a new combat style on each stage.

The Clausewitz Battalion is voiced by the following people:

・ Captain Vel Dina: Lynn

・ Swordsman Leon Haith: Takeo Otsuka

・ Heavy Infantryman Alex Galleon: Hiroki Yasumoto

・ Archer Lily Maple: Chiwa Saito

・ Scout Seth Arden: Atsumi Tanezaki

・ Cavalry Erik Lapide: Yuuichirou Umehara

・ Thief Jade Shadowclaw: Nobuhiko Okamoto

・ Wizard Ann Clausen: Karin Takahashi

This game has both Japanese and English voice options.

Choose your language and experience the story in either!

About the acronym C.A.R.D.S. RPG:

C: Commander - Represents Veldina's leadership

A: Adventure - Represents the Clausewitz Mercenary Group

R: Revolution - Represents innovative games and narrative

D: Deck building - Represents the genre and gameplay

S: Strategy - Represents the strategic elements of the entire game

supported_languages:
Japanese*, English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
